title: paspalum foliosum
intro: Paspalum foliosum, also known as the broad-leaved paspalum, is a type of perennial grass native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of P. foliosum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate cough, and soothe digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea or using the plant's extracts in tinctures and poultices.
